## What is this resource?

## Why does it fit this list?

## Affiliation disclosure (required)

<!-- Are you the author, maintainer, employee, or otherwise affiliated with this project?
     Self-submissions are welcome but MUST be disclosed. Write "None" if not affiliated. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/leoncuhk/awesome-quant-ai/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] One resource per PR, added to the most relevant **existing** section
- [ ] Entry matches the section's format: `- [Name](url) - Description ending with period.`
- [ ] I searched the README — this is not a duplicate
- [ ] Affiliation disclosed above (or "None")
